text: Germ cells are reproductive-lineage cells in broad fish contexts. They are associated with gamete-lineage continuity across reproductive tissues.
notes: Starter definition aligned to ontology mapping.

text: Epithelial cells are barrier and lining cells in broad fish tissues. They are associated with surface protection, transport interfaces, and tissue compartment boundaries.
notes: Starter definition aligned to ontology mapping.

text: Stromal cells are interstitial support cells in broad fish tissues. They are associated with extracellular matrix support and local structural organization.
notes: Broad fish label placeholder pending namespace expansion.

text: Endothelial cells are vascular lining cells in broad fish tissues. They are associated with blood vessel interfaces and vascular homeostasis.
notes: Starter definition aligned to ontology mapping.

text: Immune cells are defense-lineage cells in broad fish tissues. They are associated with innate and adaptive immune surveillance and response programs.
notes: Starter definition aligned to ontology mapping.

text: Blood cells are hematopoietic or circulating cells in broad fish contexts. They are associated with oxygen transport, immunity, and systemic circulation functions.
notes: Starter definition aligned to ontology mapping.

text: Neural cells are nervous-system cells in broad fish tissues. They are associated with neuronal signaling and glial support states.
notes: Starter definition aligned to ontology mapping.

text: Muscle-like cells are contractile cells in broad fish tissues. They are associated with force generation and smooth-muscle-like support programs.
notes: Starter definition aligned to ontology mapping.
